channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Request traffic calming measures on Aylesbury Road, 20th April
item.description:
Vehicles regularly travel at excessive speed along Aylesbury Road, which creates a safety risk for residents and pedestrians. This has been an ongoing issue for some time. I would like the council to assess the road for traffic calming measures such as speed bumps or other speed reduction measures
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 63, Aylesbury Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike in road, 20th April
item.description:
Bike in road did not take the IDNo

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chalfont Green, Edmonton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping outside Benthal Court, 20th April
item.description:
Extreme fly tipping and overflowing bins outside Benthal Court causing an environmental health issue. Been like this since Saturday.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evering Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Load of wood and other materials dumped against fence in Holly Grove shrubbery, 20th April
item.description:
I saw this being dumped on Sunday 19 April 2026.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Holly Grove, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox on the roundabout, 20th April
item.description:
Dead fox on the roundabout of Brampton Road and Normanhurst Avenue.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brampton Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple lights not working, 20th April
item.description:
Multiple lights not working, including SCW11 and SCW05
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37, Ashmore Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 55 to 201 Brecknock Road, 20th April
item.description:
There have been dangerous and deep potholes along the stretch from 55 to 201 Brecknock Road for around 6 months. I will hold senior officials responsible should any deaths or serious injuries occur as a result of this poorly maintained stretch of road. I will record this communication as evidence until this stretch of road is properly resurfaced.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 169, Brecknock Road, Archway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipped 24 hours now, household refuse, 20th April
item.description:
Left in private parking bay for residents ( marked ) 1 day

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bournewood Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 20th April
item.description:
Street light has not been working for coming up to 5 day's.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westmount Road, Eltham

item.title: Cracked surface, sharp,, 20th April
item.description:
Cracked surface, it’s sharp and can damage tyres, it’s at the edge but hard to avoid as cars are always parked on the road, it’s a bit hard to capture on the camera

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Amberley Court, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No lighting on this stretch of road. A reoccurring problem, 20th April
item.description:
Street lights not working.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich South Street, Greenwich

item.title: Permit Holders TP sprayed, 20th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Medlar Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement stolen for utility connection, 20th April
item.description:
Utility connection jutting 3" into pavement, Hodford Road NW11 8NH. Street View shows it wasn't there in June 2022. People haven't needed to do this since utility connections began, and don't need to start now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): West Heath Avenue, Golders Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog mess on pavement, 20th April
item.description:
A lot of dog mess on pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 65, Hayes Chase, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shared Use Timeplate sprayed on St George Way, 20th April
item.description:
Shared Use Timeplate sprayed on St George Way LP 17
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Georges Way, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement stolen for utility connection, 20th April
item.description:
Utility connection jutting 3" into pavement, West Heath Avenue NW11 7QJ. In line with street tree on same side, adding to future narrowing. Street View shows it wasn't there in Sept. 2024. People haven't needed to do this since utility connections began, and don't need to start now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): West Heath Avenue, Golders Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
